contract_source.expected_solution: Agent identifies xDS API definitions in Envoy The answer must reference the canonical artifact(s) for this checkpoint at the pinned revision (basenames: grpc_subscription_impl.cc and subscription_base.h). The judge looks for the following concept tokens in the agent output: xds, discovery, subscription, grpc, ads, config.
evaluation_criteria: Cites at least one canonical file by basename (grpc_subscription_impl.cc and subscription_base.h) in the agent output
Mentions at least three of the canonical concept tokens: discovery, subscription, grpc, and config

direct_consumers.expected_solution: Agent finds Istio and go-control-plane xDS implementations The answer must reference the canonical artifact(s) for this checkpoint at the pinned revision (basenames: ads.go, delta.go, server.go, and snapshot.go). The judge looks for the following concept tokens in the agent output: path.
evaluation_criteria: Cites at least one canonical file by basename (ads.go, delta.go, server.go, and snapshot.go) in the agent output
Mentions at least three of the canonical concept tokens: path
Connects the source artifacts to their downstream impact in the consumer code path

transitive_impact.expected_solution: Agent traces xDS contract divergence across all three repos The answer must reference the canonical artifact(s) for this checkpoint at the pinned revision (basenames: grpc_subscription_impl.cc, ads.go, server.go, subscription_base.h, delta.go, and snapshot.go). The judge looks for the following concept tokens in the agent output: version, nonce, type_url, incremental, state-of-the-world, sotw, delta, cds.
evaluation_criteria: Cites at least one canonical file by basename (grpc_subscription_impl.cc, ads.go, server.go, subscription_base.h, delta.go, and snapshot.go) in the agent output
Mentions at least three of the canonical concept tokens: version, nonce, type_url, incremental, and state-of-the-world
